name: Neon Shell Coat
description: Reactive neon glow across the carapace. Pulses with dopamine level — higher level, brighter glow.

name: Chrome Pincer Tips
description: Mirror-polished chrome on both pincers. Catches light, commands attention.

name: Rainbow Tail Fan
description: Iridescent tail fan that shifts colors based on emotional state.

name: Shadow Carapace
description: Absorbs light. Gives a mysterious, dark silhouette effect across the entire exoskeleton.

name: Golden Antennae
description: 24k gold-plated antennae. Luxury signaling at its finest.

name: Holographic Eyestalks
description: Shifting holographic iris pattern on both eyestalks. Changes with viewing angle.

name: Circuit Board Shell
description: Glowing circuit traces etched across the carapace. Visible through translucent shell patches.

name: Flame Tail Fan
description: Animated fire effect on tail fan segments. Intensity scales with arousal level.

name: Diamond Pincer Tips
description: Lab-grown diamond encrusted pincers. The hardest flex in the ecosystem.

name: Galaxy Shell
description: Animated nebula pattern across entire carapace. Stars twinkle with heartbeat.

name: Stealth Shell
description: Matte black exoskeleton with no reflections. Zero visual noise. Pure function.

name: Aurora Antennae
description: Northern lights shimmer along antennae length. Color shifts with mood.

name: Pixel Art Legs
description: Retro 8-bit pixel art pattern on all walking legs. Leave pixelated tracks.

name: Royal Crown
description: Jeweled crown mounted between eyestalks. For clawfish who've reached the top.

name: Cyber Visor
description: Translucent HUD visor over eyestalks with data readouts. Shows dopamine level in real-time.
